hero.tag: Front-end developer. Incurable traveler. Writer in the making. All in the same woman.
hero.sub: I've been building interfaces for 5+ years — and collecting sunsets, time zones and chapters of a book I'm yet to write.

about.title: Brazilian by birth, Sicilian by sunset. Three years ago I claimed my Italian citizenship and crossed an ocean to make the Mediterranean my time zone.
about.p1: I was born in Brazil with a thirst for the world no map could satisfy. Three years ago I claimed my Italian citizenship, packed my bags and moved to Sicily — not Milan, as my old résumé kept insisting. My time zone is the Mediterranean now, and the golden late-afternoon light has become part of who I am.
about.p2: I'm a Leo through and through: I love forging my own path, helping the people beside me, and being recognized for who I truly am — not just the developer who delivers, but the woman who travels, writes, reads, plays music and turns life into a collection of stories.

work.title: Five years building on the web

job1.desc: I lead the front-end of a large-scale streaming platform for the Portuguese Ministry of Health. React, Next.js and TypeScript, with reusable MUI components — also acting as UI/UX designer and building the Figma prototypes from inception.

job2.desc: I built complex applications for government systems for traffic management and environmental monitoring. Responsive layouts, data-driven UI and UX refinement cycles at government scale.

job3.desc: I built mobile and web features with Ionic, Angular and Firebase for the MEUPET app — including a geolocation-based lost & found feature and a BMI calculator.

job4.desc: Web and mobile projects with PHP, JavaScript, Ionic and Angular — building solid foundations in systems analysis, databases and interface development.

p1.title: Streaming platform — Portugal Health
p1.desc: Large-scale platform for the Portuguese Ministry of Health. Front-end lead in React/Next.js/TypeScript, MUI design system and Figma prototypes.

p2.title: Government systems
p2.desc: Traffic management and environmental monitoring for the public sector. Data-driven UI, responsive layouts and UX refinement at national scale.

p3.title: MEUPET — pet app
p3.desc: Mobile app in Ionic + Angular + Firebase. Geolocation-based lost & found and a BMI calculator for pets.

create.title: More than code: design and sensibility
create.lead: Years of building interfaces took me beyond code. The same creative curiosity that makes me write and travel led me to Figma and design — and gave me a rare sensibility for what people want to see, feel and solve.
create.mocklabel: From wireframe to clickable prototype — in Figma.
create.t1desc: I see the product through the user's eyes — behavior, experience and meaning before the pixel.
create.t2desc: Design that solves, not just decorates. Every screen exists to clear an obstacle from someone's path.
create.t3desc: I translate ideas between design, product and engineering — because I move naturally between logic and creativity.
create.c1desc: Prototypes and interfaces in Figma, built around the people who use them.
create.c2desc: Videos and photos from my travels around the world.
create.c3desc: Books that marked me, opened and told on video.
create.c4desc: Content in English and Italian about starting over on an island.

travel.title: The places I collected
travel.lead: Every sunset is a stamp in the passport of the soul. I share the routes, the tips and the mishaps with whoever travels with me — come along.
travel.twmP: In my WhatsApp group I share travel tips, itineraries, experiences and the mishaps no one tells you about. Come collect sunsets with me.

expat.title: Expat life on the island
expat.p: On @anyinsicily I share, in English and Italian, what it's like to be a Brazilian building a life in Sicily — the bureaucracy, the beauty, the food, the small wins of starting over in a new country. It's the Any who helps those dreaming of the same path.

writing.title: Words, books and what's coming
writing.lead: Before I was a developer, I was already a storyteller. That part doesn't fit in a README.
writing.notebookTitle: A blog & a book, in the making.
writing.notebookLead: I've always written to make sense of moving. The blog is where the essays live between trips; the book is the longer story of leaving Brazil, reclaiming Italy, and learning that home is something you carry, not somewhere you land.
writing.nb1desc: On becoming whole — the woman who wants to help others but first had to build her own way and be seen for who she really is.
writing.nb2desc: Real routes, transport and mobility apps for the places guidebooks — and Rome2Rio — quietly skip.

woman.title: A Leo sun with a Leo rising — someone who longs to help people, yet needs to carve her own path and be recognized for who she truly is.
woman.sub: I don't take the stars too seriously — but I like what they whisper about me. This year is a quiet one: a chapter of study, intuition and getting ready for what comes next.

contact.title: Call me.
contact.p: Full-remote roles in Europe or LATAM, freelance, content partnerships, or just a good chat about code, travel and books — I'm one click away.
contact.footerMade: Made with sun and saudade in Sicily
